name: Reports - Staff Purchase Report
body: [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Find "}, {"type": "a", "url": "https://galaxy.maropost.com/kb/articles/263-reports-staff-purchase-report#Faqs", "children": [{"text": "related articles", "bold": true}]}, {"text": " ", "bold": true}, {"text": "at the bottom of this page"}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The Staff Purchase Report provides detailed information on purchases made by staff. Using the report you can review transaction products, pricing, discounts, COGS, direct costs and more."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "For staff to be included in results, they must be created as a customer with the Customer Type field set to & \"Employee\"."}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphNUEAY.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphNUEAY.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "blobid2 (9).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Using the Staff Purchase Report"}], "data-id": "using-the-staff-purchase-report"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "To use the Staff Purchase Report:"}]}, {"type": "ol", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Navigate to "}, {"text": "Reports > EOM Reports > Staff Purchase Report", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select from the "}, {"text": "Filters ", "bold": true}, {"text": "as required (see below for more information)"}]}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphMgEAI.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphMgEAI.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "large", "float": "none", "name": "blobid1 (18).png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Click "}, {"text": "Search", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "The results will be displayed; "}, {"text": "scroll to the right", "bold": true}, {"text": " to view more detail"}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "To export the report click the "}, {"text": "Export ", "bold": true}, {"text": "button "}, {"type": "rich_embed_card", "dataSourceType": "image", "url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphPQEAY.jpg", "embedData": {"url": "https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/image.05T5g00000pphPQEAY.jpg", "embedType": "image", "displaySize": "inline", "float": "none", "name": "mceclip0 - 2023-07-09T225100.884.png"}, "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Select your export format; the file will download automatically"}]}]}]}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"type": "h2", "children": [{"text": "Filters"}], "data-id": "filters"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Most of the filtering fields are self explanatory, however see the detailed information below for the more advanced fields."}]}, {"type": "table", "children": [{"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Filter", "bold": true}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Details", "bold": true}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Invoice Number"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Entering an invoice number will ignore all other Search Filters"}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Product PLU Code"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Supplier SKU, Manufacturer SKU or Product ID."}]}, {"type": "callout", "children": [{"type": "callout-item", "children": [{"text": "To use multiple SKUs enter the codes separated by a comma e.g. 124001, 124002"}]}], "appearance": "info"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"text": ""}]}]}]}, {"type": "tr", "children": [{"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "Currency To Display"}]}]}, {"type": "td", "children": [{"type": "p", "children": [{"text": "The currency as controlled by the "}, {"text": "Countries"}, {"text": " in the database"}]}]}]}], "id": "rich-table-487f3994"}, {"type": "p", "children": [{"type": "a", "url": "", "children": [{"text": ""}]}, {"text": "Want more information? Find related articles here:"}]}, {"type": "ul", "children": [{"type": "li", "children": [{"type": "lic", "children": [{"text": "Reporting for EOFY "}]}]}]}]
